calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir S. Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs David Cole Carlos Guzman, Robert Matthews and Darrell Turley.
No appearance by defendant Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc.

Default was entered against defendant on August 21, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 19, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 18, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Frank Banducci, Harold C. Hughes, Flora Mae Norris, Michael Todd and Christopher Walker, and against the Defaulted Defendant Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $4,923.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $327.06.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $200.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $5,450.56.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Continued To Dec-17-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-15-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
